description: Workflow hooks. SessionStart persists workflow shell environment exports when .workflow/config.yml exists and injects provider-backed workflow authoring policy only for main sessions. PreToolUse protects provider cache issue body projections from unsafe frontmatter edits. UserPromptSubmit reads mentioned and pending GitHub issue references through cache-aware provider reads and injects project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext. Stop records session-mentioned issues as pending without provider reads or JSON output.

hooks.description: Protect provider cache issue body projections from unsafe frontmatter edits
Inject workflow authoring resolver policy for configured workflow projects in main sessions
Cache mentioned GitHub issue references and inject project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext
Record session-mentioned GitHub issues as pending without provider reads or Stop JSON output
